sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62580" key="le/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λέρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a fish, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.14</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
